posts.text:
Many Republicans have calculated that fealty to the president is necessary for their political survival. Thomas Massie isn’t one of them. That cost him yesterday’s election. 

Ahead of the primary, 1843 met the Kentuckian who stood his ground https://www.economist.com/1843/2026/04/17/the-republican-congressman-taking-on-trump?taid=6a0e2586b4da5300017b1109&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: Anthropic's revenue is set to more than double to $10.9 billion in Q2 2026, an "explosive rate of growth" that will make the company profitable for the first time ever, per WSJ.

The company is set to turn an operating profit of $559 million in Q2 2026.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: There’s so much going on below the top level conscious awareness.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
